questions.question: A random variable X has a discrete uniform distribution on the set {1, 2, 3, 4, 5}. What is the probability that X takes the value 3?
A continuous random variable Y follows a normal distribution with mean μ = 10 and standard deviation σ = 2. Find the probability that Y is less than 12.
A random variable X has a discrete probability mass function given by P(X = 1) = 1/6, P(X = 2) = 1/6, P(X = 3) = 1/2, and all other probabilities are 0. What is the expected value of X?
